approved_control.objective: Operate the cybernetic control chain from JSON control files only.
approved_control.success_condition: The JSON control chain is validated, compiled, executed through the JSON protocol, and verifier-gated.
approved_control.what_counts_as_done: Official Markdown control inputs fail while JSON control files and runtime progress outputs pass their checks.
rules_that_must_not_change: Approved control JSON is read-only during runtime.
Markdown is not an official guard, compiler, or runtime input.
The verifier must permit any achieved final report.

required_steps.transition: new control authoring guidance points to run-directory JSON files
evidence: JSON example files under skill assets
